quantum_research.title: Study the Create Teleporters quantum chain — review JEI for the 5-step Quantum Mechanism recipe

create_advanced.title: Confirm your Create network can supply the quantum chain — brass, precision, encased components available

subtitle.text: You have built a civilization. You have crossed the void. You have survived every mechanism designed to stop you. One thing remains.

description: The Create Teleporters mod adds instant dimensional travel.
The Quantum Mechanism is the capstone — a five-step chain of processed quantum materials.
When installed in a Create Teleporter, it enables teleportation to any registered location.
Your Create network from Ch06-07 should handle this.
If your network needs expansion, this is the time.
The Lords of All are not those who conquered everything.
They are those who built the infrastructure for everyone.
→ Study the quantum chain in JEI [check]
→ Confirm your Create network is ready [check]
